findings.description: The source includes a note clarifying that the `formClassPackage` property is configured by architects and individual developers do not need to set it. This is actionable developer guidance (scoping responsibility) and is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: ※この設定値は、アーキテクトなどが設定するものであり個々の開発者が設定する必要はない。

findings.description: The source includes the same architect/developer responsibility note for the `sqlFilePackage` property — that it is configured by architects and individual developers do not need to set it. This note is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: ※この設定値は、アーキテクトなどが設定するものであり個々の開発者が設定する必要はない。
